title: TVK president Vijay declares nearly ₹625 crore in assets and loans to family members
content: According to his election affidavit, the movable assets include 883 grams of gold, five cars, and a two-wheeler in his name and 3,132 grams of gold and 134.91 karats of diamond in the name of his spouse. He has ₹2 lakh in cash, while his spouse has ₹1 lakh

title: Press Club of India issues election reporting advisory to media
content: The PCI has advised print media to follow the Guidelines on Election Reporting and Norms of Journalistic Conduct-2022

title: Opposition seeks discussion on impact of West Asia crisis
content: Members point to how the war has affected LPG, crude supplies and fertilizer production; Rijiju says govt. was ready to work with Opposition, but noted that PM had made statement on the issue

title: Telangana Government steps in as LPG shortage disrupts auto services
content: Government initiates three-step response, seeking to stabilise fuel availability, ease pressure on drivers, and strengthen public transportation systems

title: Bike taxi rider arrested for alleged molestation of woman passenger
content: The police said the 25-year-old complainant, a resident of Indiranagar, had booked the ride around 8.10 p.m. on March 26

title: Container Road remains dark, after installing 1,100 lights
content: On its part, the NHAI responded on March 23, saying that the ‘supervision consultant’ had accorded the highest priority to the matter and that discussions were under way with the KSEB and other authorities concerned

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: Modi spotlight on Sobha as BJP goes all out in Palakkad
content: Early signs of her campaign suggest that, compared to her main rivals, she has  carved out a strong image as a serious and formidable contender

title: Naidu alleges Jagan built palace, neglected housing for poor
content: Chief Minister says over 2.5 lakh houses launched Statewide while accusing Jagan of scrapping NTR Housing scheme, diverting Central funds and leaving ₹923 crore dues unpaid

title: Assam CM questions Congress promise of fast justice for Zubeen Garg
content: Himanta Biswa Sarma says ‘justice can be delivered only by courts, not by political leaders’, adding that the government had done its job by filing chargesheets and putting the accused behind bars

title: Delhi Police arrests Lashkar-e-Taiba operative
content: Calling Lone as a hardcore and highly-trained terrorist, officials said he reportedly established links with handlers operating on behalf of Inter-Services Intelligence (ISI)

title: Revisiting Dasgaon, where a 23-year-old drank water from a well and broke a social order
content: Months before the Mahad Satyagraha of 1927, a similar symbolic act by the people of Dasgaon in Maharashtra took place. A group of about 300, led by Ramchandra Babaji More, drew water from a well and a lake and drank it. The satyagrahis were Dalits, implementing a resolution to open public water bodies to them. Now, 100 years later, the people of Dasgaon have forgotten the event

title: A.P. govt. aims to construct 17 lakh houses for poor by 2029, says CM Naidu
content: More than 2.5 lakh houses built under APTIDCO and PMAY schemes have been handed over to the beneficiaries across the State

title: Stalin, Vijay and other leaders file nominations as ECI issues Assembly election notification
content: The DMK president and Tamil Nadu Chief Minister submits his papers to the Returning Officer for the Kolathur constituency. TVK president C. Joseph Vijay, who is making his debut in electoral politics, files his nomination for Perambur

title: Assam saw long span of instability, but things changed in past decade: PM Modi
content: Addressing booth-level BJP workers in the poll-bound State, the Prime Minister asks them to make first-time voters aware of Congress misrule

title: LDF govt. the most inefficient Kerala has ever seen, UDF will win: Satheesan
content: Kerala’s Leader of Opposition V.D. Satheesan says the Congress has brought back 90% of the social groups that left the UDF; he says the LDF government has put the State in a “huge debt trap” and has “failed in the health, education, agriculture and welfare sectors” due to which there is a current against the government

title: Yatnal should ensure BJP’s defeat in bypolls, suggests M.B. Patil
content: If the expelled BJP leader has any self-respect and honour, now is the time for him to do it, the Minister says

title: Civility stands out in parts of Assam amid bitter poll campaign
content: Jorhat, Tamulpur, and two Guwahati constituencies are among the few where candidates are demonstrating mutual respect rather than bitterness raging elsewhere

title: Assembly Elections highlights: Everyone working hard for BJP-NDA hat-trick in Assam, says PM Modi
content: In Kerala, Rahul Gandhi says UDF is fighting the State election "against the LDF, which is fully supported by the BJP"

title: Delimitation row: Revanth Reddy wants current gap in seats be maintained, as 50% increase in Lok Sabha seats will leave South at a disadvantage
content: If the 50% model is applied uniformly, the five southern States collectively would gain aroud 66 seats, while Hindi-belt and northern States, would see a rise of roughly 142 seats, Mr. Reddy said

title: Three traffic policemen suspended for taking bribes after switching off body-worn cameras
content: The suspended personnel have been identified as Assistant Sub-Inspector Suresh G., and police constables Prashanth K. and Sadik S.B.

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Ahead of elections, FCRA Bill puts BJP on the defensive in Kerala
content: Several Church heads criticise the Bill, flagging concern over ‘executive overreach into minority institutions.’ Congress, CPI(M) too oppose the move. BJP seeks to downplay the Bill’s impact, says Union Home Minister has promised to address all concerns

title: Fourteen people fall ill with diarrhoea in Palnadu district
content: The administration suspects the cause could be either contamination of water in the RO plant or the effect of heat.

title: Armed Forces Tribunal faces 11,097 pending cases; vacancies across Benches raise concern
content: Defence Ministry informs Rajya Sabha 44,622 cases have been filed before AFT between 2021 and January 2026, of which 33,525 cases disposed of.

title: CPI flays Centre over weakening of rural job scheme, plans padayatra in Rayalaseema
content: Ramakrishna says funding cut from 90% to 60% burdens States; G. Eswaraiah flags neglect of Rayalaseema irrigation projects and seeks ₹32,000 crore for Polavaram

title: Dr NTRUHS unveils initiatives to enhance medical research and student welfare
content: Vice-Chancellor of the university announces the establishment of a Disease Monitoring and Decision Support Centre under the Integrated Disease Surveillance Programme on the premises.

title: NDA, Opposition spar in Lok Sabha over efforts to curb left-wing extremism
content: From the Opposition benches, Mahua Moitra of the Trinamool Congress questioned the timing of the debate, saying a far more serious crisis in West Asia was affecting India, with people facing shortages of LPG and fuel, and rising airfares.

title: Eravikulam National Park opens for tourists on April 1
content: Calving season of Nilgiri tahrs concludes; rainbow point, a three-tier photo point, and medicinal garden introduced inside the park

title: Housing Census in Andhra Pradesh from May 1; self-enumeration to start on April 16
content: House listing runs till May 30; citizens submit details online April 16-30; 1.08 lakh enumerators deployed, says official as Census goes digital for first time

title: BDA calls tender for Peripheral Ring Road-1 project
content: The peripheral ring road will be 23 km in length, of which only a 19.80 km stretch has been taken up for construction in package-1

title: IN-SPACe invites applications for student competition
content: The national level finales for both competitions are expected to take place between October and November 2026 in Kushinagar, Uttar Pradesh

title: Andhra Pradesh Lokayukta recovers ₹15.29 crore, disposes of 3,654 complaints in 2025
content: As per the annual report, the office of the Lokayukta remained vacant, with Upa-Lokayukta P. Rajani discharging all responsibilities under the provisions of the Andhra Pradesh Lokayukta Act, 1983.

title: Bihar CM Nitish Kumar, BJP president Nitin Nabin resign from legislative seats
content: Both leaders are likely to take oath as newly-elected Rajya Sabha MPs in Parliament on April 10; JD(U) leaders and workers feel gloomy at Mr. Kumar’s exit from State politics

title: Miller’s new NFL mock draft: Seven full rounds of projections, from first overall to Mr. Irrelevant
content: Matt Miller predicted every pick in the 2026 NFL draft, from the Raiders' selection at No. 1 to the Broncos' Mr. Irrelevant slot at the end of Round 7.

title: Mullins' last-second 3 sends UConn to Final Four
content: UConn eliminated No. 1 overall seed Duke from the men's NCAA tournament on Braylon Mullins' 3-pointer with 0.4 seconds left.

title: Eagles GM offers same reply to every Brown query
content: Eagles general manager Howie Roseman had a stock answer for every question about receiver A.J. Brown that he fielded from the local media at the league meetings Sunday, opting for a neutral response amid the ongoing trade speculation.

title: Source: Agreed-to Epenesa-Browns deal now off
content: The Cleveland Browns will not be signing AJ Epenesa, with the team uncomfortable finalizing the deal after the veteran defensive end had his physical, a source told ESPN on Sunday.

title: Sources: NFL set to begin hiring replacement refs
content: NFL owners are "alarmed" by the state of negotiations with the NFL Referees Association and have authorized staff members to begin hiring and onboarding replacement officials in the coming weeks, league sources said Sunday.

title: Zona, Michigan co-faves as bettors back UConn
content: Arizona and Michigan will head into the Final Four deadlocked as the favorites to win the NCAA men's basketball tournament and at nearly a pick 'em for their head-to-head showdown, with Illinois and UConn battling it out as the underdogs.

title: Sources: NC State to hire ex-player Gainey as HC
content: Justin Gainey, who has spent five seasons as an assistant with Tennessee, is returning to NC State to be the Wolfpack's next head basketball coach, sources told ESPN.

title: Pitino lands new deal after leading SJU resurgence
content: Rick Pitino has signed a new deal with St. John's that makes him the second-highest-paid coach in the Big East.

title: Mets fans boo Bichette as early strikeouts mount
content: Bo Bichette heard his first boos from Mets fans as he has struck out eight times in his first three games. "I thought my at-bats were terrible, too," he said.

title: Women's Elite Eight: Previewing Monday's matchups
content: From pregame analysis to postgame keys, we've got you covered for all of Monday's Elite Eight action.

title: How UConn and UCLA clinched a spot in the women's Final Four
content: UCLA rallied to beat Duke and UConn held off Notre Dame as both No. 1 seeds won Sunday in the Elite Eight.

title: Passan: The best -- and worst -- automated balls-and-strikes challenges of MLB opening weekend
content: Baseball's new ABS system is the talk of the sport. We hand out awards after the first weekend of the rule.

title: A historic rookie class? Is Trout back? 10 things we learned from MLB's opening weekend
content: From early trends to the most -- and least -- surprising performances, this is what stood out from baseball's return.

title: Kryptonite for 10 NBA title contenders: Which weaknesses could sink playoff teams?
content: We evaluated every playoff contender's biggest weaknesses, how it will impact the postseason and which team is best positioned to exploit them.

title: NBA playoff watch: East, West leaders meet in OKC
content: Could Pistons-Thunder be a Finals preview? Plus, updated playoff projections, draft lottery standings after Sunday.

title: Why new rules have Verstappen on the brink of walking away from F1
content: Max Verstappen predicted F1's new rule set would underwhelm, and 2026 is proving him correct, so much so that he might just quit the sport entirely.

title: Men's March Madness 2026: Ranking the Final Four teams
content: Four teams will play for it all next weekend. Let's rank Michigan, Arizona, Illinois and UConn one final time.

title: Future of Giannis and Ja, and the big questions facing every NBA lottery team
content: With 10 NBA teams already eyeing the offseason, Bobby Marks examines each front office's biggest priority.

title: Are tight ends making a first-round comeback? Why top NFL draft prospect Kenyon Sadiq could be next in line
content: Colston Loveland and Tyler Warren set the bar high last year, and Oregon's Kenyon Sadiq has a shot to reach it.

title: Keeping Colts in the family: Why Irsay sisters are shunning private equity (for now)
content: Renovations to Lucas Oil Stadium will be costly. Irsay-Gordon acknowledged diversified funding could help.

title: How has USMNT player pool evolved since 2022, and what does it mean for World Cup?
content: It's been a weird four year World Cup cycle for the USMNT, but heading into 2026, how well is this team set up for success this year and in 2030?

title: Tudor's disastrous six-week stint has left Spurs even closer to relegation. What happened?
content: Igor Tudor will be remembered at Tottenham Hotspur as the firefighter who used gasoline instead of water. That's if he's remembered at all.

title: NHL playoff watch: Are the Penguins and Islanders destined for a first-round matchup?
content: The Metro teams face off Monday -- and maybe again in April. Plus, bracket projections, draft lottery standings.

title: College baseball Week 7: Top-25 rankings, best moments and what to watch
content: Breaking down the latest top-25 college baseball rankings plus our favorite moments from the past week.

title: McDonald's All American girls' game: Saniyah Hall vs. Jerzy Robinson, more to watch
content: From schedules to rosters to the elite one-on-one matchups, here is everything to know about the girls' All-Star game.

title: Peyton Manning: Pat Summitt changed my life
content: Legendary NFL quarterback Peyton Manning recounts a career-changing meeting with Pat Summitt that he credits for sparking a lifelong friendship.

title: WNBA's CBA: 10 biggest wins from new agreement
content: The CBA permanently and positively changes the WNBA's landscape. These are the wins, biggest strides and areas of compromise.

title: Hyo Joo Kim repeats as Ford champ, tops Nelly Korda again
content: Hyo Joo Kim beat Nelly Korda for the second straight week, pulling away around the turn Sunday and closing with a 3-under 69 for a two-shot victory in the Ford Championship.

title: 2026 World Cup playoffs: Predicting who will claim the final six places
content: The last six World Cup berths will be decided on Tuesday in six winner-take-all games. Which teams will complete the lineup for this summer's finals?

title: Men's tournament first bets for the semifinals: Slow start for Michigan and Arizona?
content: Taking a look at early lines, which bets stand out as potential values ahead of the tournament's round of four?

title: Transfer rumors, news: Atlético want Arsenal's Jesus, Martinelli
content: Could Atlético Madrid offer Gabriel Jesus and Gabriel Martinelli a route out of Arsenal? Plus, Spurs continue their manager search. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: Draft guide: Rankings, tips, strategy, stats and more
content: All the rankings, projections, cheat sheets, strategy and analysis you need for the fantasy baseball season.

title: N.K. Premachandran alleges CPI(M)-BJP ‘deal’ in 18 seats, targets CM over SDPI links
content: e-Paper The View From India Looking at World Affairs from the Indian perspective . first day first show news and reviews from the world of cinema and streaming . the weekly newsletter from science writers takes the jargon out of science and puts the fun in!

title: Mark Cuban disagrees with Musk's 'work optional' vision: What he said about SpaceX IPO
content: Mark Cuban publicly challenged Elon Musk's prediction of optional work, highlighting risks of AI and robot integration. Cuban's mock IPO filing warned of potential new taxes like robot utilization fees and market infrastructure failures. He proposed a Grok-created blockchain for stock trading, emphasizing the need for legal and regulatory adaptation to automation's rapid advance.

title: Dhurandhar: The Revenge box office collection day 12: Film eyes Rs 1000 crore
content: 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' has officially made history with its day 11 collections. The film enters its second Monday and day 12, today,  March 30, 2026. In a stunning display of box office dominance, the Ranveer Singh starrer has surpassed the lifetime India net of its predecessor, 'Dhurandhar Part 1' with its Rs. 840.20 crore, in just 11 days - a feat that originally took 15 weeks. With a current domestic net of Rs. 848.55 crore and a global gross of Rs. 1,361.95 crore, the Aditya Dhar directorial is now chasing the elite Rs. 1,000 crore India net club.

title: Happy Mahavir Jayanti 2026: Wishes, messages and quotes to share
content: article offers 50 curated wishes, messages, and quotes for family, friends, and social media. These messages focus on peace, compassion, and truth. They aim to convey genuine sentiment and spiritual depth for Mahavir Jayanti 2026.

title: Why rupee breached 95 versus dollar mark despite RBI's move to stem fall
content: According to forex market participants, the domestic unit remains under pressure due to persistent outflows by foreign investors and the strengthening of the US dollar, driven by ongoing uncertainty linked to the West Asia conflict.

title: Google founder to employees at town hall: This year a big role will be played by AI agents
content: Google employees are buzzing about Agent Smith, an internal AI tool automating tasks and accessible via mobile. Its popularity led to restricted access, highlighting Google's focus on AI agents for productivity in 2026, as emphasized by cofounder Sergey Brin. AI adoption is becoming mandatory across the company, with usage even impacting performance reviews.

title: Decoding drone warfare: Are Nagastra & Sheshnaag India's answer to Shahed & LUCAS?
content: India's military is embracing drone warfare, moving beyond surveillance to integrate unmanned systems into combat operations. Operation Sindoor highlighted this shift, showcasing capability but revealing a critical need for mass production. While India designs advanced drones, it lags behind global powers in producing them at scale, a gap that must be bridged for future battlefield dominance.

title: Garrett Wilson’s New York Jets tied to $11 million Los Angeles Chargers wide receiver
content: Los Angeles Chargers wide receiver Quentin Johnston is reportedly a trade possibility due to a significant decline in targets and a lack of a 1,000-yard season. His future with the franchise is uncertain. Especially with the upcoming decision on his fifth-year option of $18 million. The New York Jets are linked to a potential trade for Johnston.

title: Microsoft AI CEO reveals what will really decide AI's winners and losers by 2028
content: Microsoft AI CEO Mustafa Suleyman asserts that the AI industry's future hinges on who can afford to run models at scale, not just who builds the smartest ones.  He argues that inference compute scarcity will define winners for the next few years, with high-margin products gaining a significant edge through a data-driven improvement flywheel.

title: CTET result 2026 declared, check scorecard download steps and qualifying marks
content: The Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) has declared the CTET Result 2026 on ctet.nic.in following the completion of the answer key review process. The exam was held on February 7 and 8 with over 2.5 million candidates. After objections to the provisional key were reviewed, the final result has been released. Candidates can now check their scorecards online using their login credentials.

title: Sanju Samson falls cheaply on CSK debut against Rajasthan Royals
content: Samson was bowled by Nandre Burger while attempting a leg-side flick. The delivery, clocked at 140.2 kmph, moved away and hit the off stump. He scored 6 runs off 7 balls in his first innings for CSK.

title: NFL Trade Rumors: Dolphins, Chargers linked to $24mn 49ers star
content: NFL trade rumors are gaining momentum again as Jauan Jennings is attracting significant trade interest from the Miami Dolphins, Los Angeles Chargers, and Titans, with the 49ers having moved on. Jennings offers a valuable skill set, excelling in red zone situations and contested catches, making him a target for teams seeking dependable receiving options. As of now, Jauan Jennings ' situation is very clear. San Francisco has moved on, and three teams have shown interest. The next step now depends on who decides to act first.

title: Aaron Rodgers Steelers: TJ Watt’s $123mn deal 'not even close'
content: The Pittsburgh Steelers face a significant financial challenge in the 2026 offseason. With T.J. Watt's hefty contract and Aaron Rodgers seeking a substantial raise, the Steelers' cap space is severely strained. Watt's production has declined, raising questions about his value, while Rodgers' strong performance has inflated his market, forcing a tough decision on which star to prioritise. Now, they must choose. Stick with a high-priced defence led by Watt or adjust the books to bring Rodgers back. Either way, the margin for error is gone.

title: Vijay declares assets worth Rs 640.51 crore in poll affidavit; here is the breakup
content: His spouse Sangeetha has declared movable assets worth Rs 15 crore and immovable assets valued at Rs 25 lakh.

title: 'Will conclude lovely stay...': Trump threatens to wipe out Iranian energy sites
content: President Trump revealed serious discussions with a "new, more reasonable" Iranian regime, but issued a stark warning: "completely obliterate" Iran's oil facilities, power plants, and Kharg Island if a deal isn't reached soon. He claimed "great progress" in negotiations, while threatening severe retaliation for past Iranian actions.  Tehran, however, denies direct talks.

title: Who is Brijesh Sharma? J&K pacer making his IPL debut for RR against CSK
content: Rajasthan Royals had picked the Jammu and Kashmir pacer at his base price of Rs 30 lakh in the IPL 2026 auction. At that time, he had not played senior cricket in any format, but his performances in the 2025 Bengal Pro T20 League had brought him into focus.

title: Why MS Dhoni and Dewald Brevis are not playing in CSK’s IPL 2026 opener
content: Chennai Super Kings face an early IPL 2026 challenge as MS Dhoni and Dewald Brevis are sidelined for their opening match against Rajasthan Royals. Brevis is out with a side strain, while Dhoni will miss the first two weeks due to a calf strain, impacting CSK's middle order and leadership.

title: Post office small savings schemes: What is the latest interest rate for April-June 2026?
content: The Finance Ministry has released the latest interest rates for the first quarter of the new financial year FY 2026-27 from April to June. The interest rates for all small savings schemes have been kept unchanged.

title: For the first time in IPL history, CSK to play without Dhoni and Raina
content: This match will be the first among 277 T20 games, including 24 in the CLT20, where CSK will not have either Dhoni or Raina in the playing XI. The team has previously played 77 matches without Raina and five without Dhoni, but never without both.

title: 'We grow up with this idea of I’ll believe it when I see it, but ... ': Demi Moore
content: Demi Moore, a trailblazer in the film industry, showcases her extraordinary ability to adapt and thrive in an ever-changing landscape. Her mantra, 'I'll see it when I believe it,' reflects a profound belief in manifesting her dreams.

title: Only 5 in 253! Matches MS Dhoni has missed for CSK in IPL
content: Dhoni has long been central to CSK as captain, finisher and wicketkeeper, but this match at the Baraspara Cricket Stadium will go ahead without him. His absence brings focus on the last time he missed a game and how often he has been unavailable since the IPL began in 2008.

title: Nifty50 ends below 22,350; Sensex plunges over 1,600 points - top reasons for fall
content: Stock market crash today: Nifty50 and BSE Sensex continued their slide on Monday, dropping sharply on negative global cues. While Nifty50 went below 22,350, BSE Sensex closed below 72,000.

title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi: Can the ‘bindaas’ star avoid second-season blues?
content: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi took the Indian Premier League (IPL) by storm last season, smashing 24 sixes off just 122 balls. In seven matches, he piled up 252 runs at a staggering strike rate of 206.55. Since then, he has continued his explosive form and helped India U-19 win the title. The second-season blues have affected many young stars in the past; the big question remains: will Vaibhav be able to sustain his meteoric rise?

title: IPL 2026: Will rain play spoilsport as RR and CSK begin new era in Guwahati?
content: Guwahati's weather looms large over the IPL 2026 opener between Rajasthan Royals and Chennai Super Kings, with rain forecasts casting doubt on the match. Both teams, aiming for a fresh start after poor seasons, feature significant player and leadership changes. Sanju Samson moves to CSK, Ravindra Jadeja to RR, and Riyan Parag captains the Royals, while Ruturaj Gaikwad leads CSK.

title: Homeless at 15, how this poor girl made it to Harvard and beyond
content: Liz Murray's journey from homelessness in the Bronx to graduating from Harvard is a testament to unwavering determination. Facing immense hardship and personal tragedy, she channeled her struggles into a fierce drive for education, completing high school in two years and earning a place at an Ivy League institution.

title: 'Beginning of whistle revolution': TVK chief Vijay launches assembly poll campaign in Chennai
content: TVK president Vijay commenced his election campaign from Perambur in Chennai. He criticized Chief Minister M K Stalin regarding an increase in crime and a deteriorating law and order situation. Vijay stated that the current administration has failed to ensure basic safety for citizens. He urged voters to support the TVK's whistle symbol, calling the election a 'whistle revolution'.

title: 'Modi controls Kerala CM': Rahul counterattacks Vijayan with same BJP 'B-team' barb
content: Kerala's political landscape is dominated by accusations of being the "BJP B team." Rahul Gandhi claims the LDF is BJP-backed, while CM Pinarayi Vijayan labels the UDF as the "BJP B team." Rahul criticizes the LDF as a corporate-funded government, alleging BJP control over Kerala's leadership and highlighting the Sabarimala gold theft.

title: 5 IPL records that look impossible to break, but not for Vaibhav Sooryavanshi
content: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has been on a record-breaking/setting spree over the last year or so and, as he prepares for his second IPL season, expectations are sky-high from the 15-year-old boy wonder.  So ,what can we expect from Sooryavanshi in his second season? A lot - plus these five iconic IPL records, which were once thought unbeatable, could very well fall to the 15-year-old teenager.

title: How a village potter invented a refrigerator that works without electricity
content: A Gujarati potter, Mansukhbhai Prajapati, revolutionized rural India with his electricity-free clay refrigerator. Born from the aftermath of the 2001 earthquake, this innovative device uses evaporation to keep food and water cool for days. Priced affordably, it offers a vital solution for households facing power cuts and limited resources, proving that practical innovation can emerge from traditional skills.

title: Dual-airport strategy in Delhi, Mumbai signals India's aviation boom
content: India's aviation landscape is undergoing a significant transformation, shifting from single, overburdened airports to a dual-airport model in major cities like Delhi-NCR and Mumbai. This strategic move aims to alleviate congestion, foster economic growth, and position India as a global aviation hub, mirroring international standards and preparing for a future of mass air travel.

title: Ranking the top Stanley Cup playoff bandwagons for ousted fans
content: this week, we're going to take a similar spin but home in on teams specifically . the top five potential playoff teams ranked by their "bandwagon jumpability" for 2026 . thursday's playoffs are the first round of the 2026 Stanley Cup playoffs .

title: MMA heavyweight madness: Which big fella would win a 16-man tournament?
content: the men's and women's basketball tournaments haven't stopped us from creating our own hypothetical tournaments for the past few years . the big fellas will take center stage in this year's bracket . former uFC and PFL heavyweight champ Alex Pereira will move up to MMA's premier weight class on may 14 .
